signals.headline: Kevin Warsh undergoes Senate confirmation hearing for Fed Chair to succeed Jerome Powell | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh undergoes Senate confirmation hearing for Fed Chair to succeed Jerome Powell | NO | HIGH confidence**

Trump nominated Kevin Warsh in January 2026 to replace Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve Chair, with Powell's term ending in May 2026; Warsh faced a polarized Senate Banking Committee hearing on April 21, defending Fed independence amid criticism from figures like Sen. Elizabeth Warren
